ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author(s) of the book */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the book (e.g., In, Out, Reserved) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the book if it is checked out */,
  "call_number" TEXT /* Unique call number assigned to the book */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition of the book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* International Standard Book Number (ISBN) */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the book */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year the book was published */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the book */,
  "subject_area" TEXT /* Subject area the book belongs to */,
  "shelf_location" TEXT /* Location of the book on the library shelf */,
  "last_checked_out" TEXT /* Date the book was last checked out */,
  "last_checked_in" TEXT /* Date the book was last checked in */,
  "times_borrowed" INTEGER /* Number of times the book has been borrowed */,
  "times_reserved" INTEGER /* Number of times the book has been reserved */,
  "digital_copy_url" TEXT /* URL to the digital copy of the book, if available */,
  "related_books" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of related book IDs */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the book */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the book */,
  "pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the book */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the book */,
  "reviews" TEXT /* Reviews of the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, staff, faculty, librarian) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered with the library */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged into the system */,
  "borrow_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of books the user can borrow at a time */,
  "current_borrow_count" INTEGER /* Number of books the user is currently borrowing */,
  "fines" REAL /* Fines owed by the user */,
  "library_card_number" TEXT /* Library card number of the user */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the user's emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user's emergency contact */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "salt" TEXT /* Salt used for password hashing */,
  "security_question" TEXT /* Security question to recover password */,
  "security_answer" TEXT /* Answer to the security question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "checkouts" (
  "checkout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each checkout event */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being checked out */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user checking out the book */,
  "checkout_date" TEXT /* Date the book was checked out */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date the book is due to be returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the book was returned */,
  "renewal_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the checkout has been renewed */,
  "late_fee" REAL /* Late fee if the book was returned after the due date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("checkout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_checkouts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_checkouts_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being reserved */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the reservation */,
  "reservation_date" TEXT /* Date the reservation was made */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the reservation expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., Active, Expired, Fulfilled) */,
  "notification_sent" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if a notification has been sent to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book involved in the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., Checkout, Return, Renewal, Fine) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount involved in the transaction, if any */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "library_representative" TEXT /* Name of the department's library representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "digital_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each digital resource */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the digital resource */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author(s) of the digital resource */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the digital resource (e.g., e-book, article, video) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to access the digital resource */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the digital resource (e.g., PDF, EPUB, HTML) */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Access type (e.g., Public, Restricted) */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the resource has been accessed */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Date the resource was last accessed */,
  "associated_book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated book, if any */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_digital_resources_associated_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("associated_book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book the author is associated with */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_authors_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)
